name: title.anvilcraft.patchouli.smithing.corrupted_beacon
pages: 本章将依次介绍： $(li)$(item)腐化信标$()的制作过程 $(li)$(item)腐化信标$()的黑色光柱附带的效果 $(li)如何搭建包含$(item)腐化信标$()的结构，以进行$(thing)时移$() $(p)$(#888888)释放了被封印在信标之中的凋灵之力。$()

pages.text: When you fully using $(l:smithing/tier_1_materials#cursed_gold_block)Cursed Gold Block$() as the base of beacons and use $(l:smithing/tier_1_materials#cursed_gold_ingot)Cursed Gold Ingot$() to activate it, the beacon will have chance to convert into $(item)Corrupted Beacon$(). The more layers of the base, the higher the conversion probability.$(br)($(thing)Automation Method$(): Use an anvil to press the curse gold ingot into the beacon. The probabilities are the same.) $(p)Use Cursed Gold Ingot to activate beacons will make weather set to Thunder.

pages: The beacon's light column will give entities in its beam $(thing)Wither$() effect and transform some mobs to another mob.: $(br)Pig→$(thing)Hoglin$() Cow→$(thing)Ravager$()$(br)Guardian→$(thing)Elder Guardian$()$(br)Piglin→$(thing)Piglin Brute$()$(br)Villager→30%%$(thing)Pillager$()、60%%$(thing)Vindicator$()、10%%$(thing)Evoker$()$(br)Allay→$(thing)Vex$()$(br)Bat→$(thing)Phantom$()$(br)Horse→10%%$(thing)Zombie Horse$()、90%%$(thing)Skeleton Horse$()$(br)Silverfish→$(thing)Endermite$()$(br)Skeleton→20%%$(thing)Wither Skeleton$()、80%%$(thing)Stray$() $(br)villager's Iron Golem→$(thing)Warden()

pages.name: Time Warp
pages.text: Time Warp operation requires lit Corrupted Beacon. This means if you want to use magnet block to control anvils on top, you need to use $(item)Hollow Magnet Block$().
Metals can be transformed into coarse ores
